case_title: DAVID PAN VS. DAVID WRIGHT et al

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,750.00 FILED BY PAN, DAVID DBA: KAPTURES PHOTOGRAPHY AS TO DEFENDANT WRIGHT, DAVID ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-09-2009 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED DEC-22-2008, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT WRIGHT, DAVID
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF PAN, DAVID DBA: KAPTURES PHOTOGRAPHY
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-09-2009 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PAN, DAVID DBA: KAPTURES PHOTOGRAPHY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT WRIGHT, DAVID CAMONES, VANESSA $1,250.00 PRINCIPAL, $110.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,360.00, PLAINTIFF SHALL TRANSFER TO DEFENDANT ALL IMAGES TO DEFENDANTS IMMEDIATELY UPON SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT BY DEFENDANT. ALL PHOTOS OR OTHER IMAGES SHALL BE PROVIDED TO DEFENDANTS IN A FORMAT THAT PERMITS DEFEDANTS TO PRINT OR REPRODUCE THE IMAGES AS DEFENDANTS MAY DESIRE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JAN-09-2009 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JAN-09-2009 BY PAUL SLAVIT. APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED APR-01-2009 ORDERED DESTROYED
